name: Premier Jewelry Lenders
description_short: Beverly Hills pawn broker specializing in high-value jewelry, watches, and diamonds. Offers collateral-based loans and purchases fine jewelry items at competitive rates.
description_long:
Premier Jewelry Lenders is a pawn shop and pawn broker located in Beverly Hills, California, founded in 2009 by Arpiar "Anthony" Sarkissian. The owner holds a Certified Gemologist degree from the Gemological Institute of America and brings over 14 years of jewelry industry experience, including prior roles at wholesale diamond dealers, upscale retail jewelry stores, and established pawn companies.

The company offers three primary services: short-term collateral-based loans against fine jewelry and watches, purchase of jewelry and watches outright, and sales of pre-owned designer jewelry and certified loose diamonds. They specialize in high-value items including pieces from Cartier, Tiffany & Co, and Van Cleef & Arpels, typically at discounts off retail prices. Customers can obtain immediate capital without credit or employment history checks, positioning the service as an alternative to conventional bank loans for those needing fast cash.

Premier Jewelry Lenders distinguishes itself through staff expertise (on-site gemologists with 14+ years experience), competitive interest rates in the pawn industry, and emphasis on privacy and security. All valuables are stored in bank vaults on the ground floor of their Beverly Hills building rather than on-site. The company provides free estimates and claims to offer fair market value assessments while maintaining transparency about loan evaluation processes.

Key limitations include no physical showroom—all purchase inquiries must be made by phone or email due to constantly changing inventory sold primarily to wholesale trade. The company does not disclose specific interest rates, loan terms, or redemption policies on their website. Availability and pricing depend entirely on contacting them directly, limiting transparency for potential borrowers.
address: 9454 Wilshire Blvd # M9, Beverly Hills, CA 90212

company_info.headquarters: 9454 Wilshire Blvd # M9, Beverly Hills, CA 90212

pros: Owner is a Certified Gemologist from GIA with 14+ years jewelry industry experience including 6+ years at established pawn companies
Offers immediate capital without requiring credit checks or employment verification
On-site staff gemologists with 14+ years experience provide personal consultation and transparent loan evaluation explanations
All collateral stored securely in bank vaults on building's ground floor, not on-site
Specializes in high-value fine jewelry, watches, and certified diamonds—not low-value items
Carries authenticated designer brands (Cartier, Tiffany & Co, Van Cleef & Arpels) at retail discounts
Private and confidential transactions with emphasis on client comfort and peace of mind
cons: No physical showroom—all transactions require phone or email contact, limiting ability to see items in person before inquiring
Website does not disclose specific interest rates, loan terms, repayment periods, or redemption policies
Inventory constantly changing and sold primarily to wholesale trade, making availability unpredictable
Limited geographic accessibility—Beverly Hills location only; no indication of online shipping or remote appraisals
Free estimates require direct contact rather than providing transparent pricing tools or calculators online
best_for: High-net-worth individuals needing immediate cash against valuable jewelry or watches without credit checks
People seeking to sell or liquidate designer jewelry (Cartier, Tiffany) at fair market value with expert appraisal
Borrowers with poor credit or irregular employment seeking short-term collateral-based loans as alternatives to bank financing
diagnosis: Premier Jewelry Lenders is best for affluent borrowers or sellers with valuable jewelry, watches, or diamonds who value privacy, expert gemological evaluation, and quick access to cash without credit requirements. The main caveat is lack of online transparency on rates and terms—all pricing and loan details require direct phone/email contact, and the Beverly Hills-only location limits accessibility for non-local customers.
services: Short-term collateral-based loans against fine jewelry and watches
Purchase of customer jewelry and timepieces at fair market value
Sale of pre-owned fine jewelry and certified loose diamonds at retail discounts
Sale of authenticated designer jewelry (Cartier, Tiffany & Co, Van Cleef & Arpels)
Professional gemological appraisal and evaluation services
Secure storage of collateral in bank vaults
Free estimates for jewelry and watch valuations
Immediate capital disbursement for loans and purchases
Color stone and diamond buying services
Watch and fine jewelry sales consultation
meta_description: Beverly Hills pawn broker specializing in jewelry, watches, and diamonds with collateral-based loans.
